issues.explanation: Chunk C031 is cited in support of this paragraph, but its content (American Express Small Business Saturday grants program announcement) does not support any claim made in the paragraph. The paragraph discusses revenue growth volatility and Visa-Mastercard regulatory settlement - C031 contains no information relevant to either topic. Only C030 supports the Visa-Mastercard settlement claim.
issues.recommended_fix: Remove C031 from the cited chunk references for this paragraph. Only C030 (Visa-Mastercard settlement news) and K001 (revenue growth calculations) are relevant to the claims made.
